name: Rum Raisin Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe French Vanilla ice cream base
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the raisins in rum for 1 hour.
2. Prepare the French Vanilla Ice cream base and strain it into a clean bowl.
3. Cool the strained mixture.
4. Transfer to an ice cream machine and freeze until firm.
Makes 1 quart.
